explicit_authorization: Authorize P255B Ingest Write Guard Design

key_findings.critical_gap_1: BackfillRequest.dry_run defaults to False — any omitted caller writes to DB
key_findings.critical_gap_2: Frontend confirmation gate is UI-only; server has no authorization layer

design_scope.task: Convert P255A audit findings (G01-G08) into a concrete implementable specification

G01_default_dry_run_true.title: Change BackfillRequest.dry_run default to True

current_state.risk: Any POST to /api/ingest/backfill that omits dry_run writes to DB

G01_default_dry_run_true.behavior_when_omitted: Treated as dry_run=True (safe preview only; no DB write)
G01_default_dry_run_true.behavior_for_write: Caller must explicitly set dry_run=False AND supply apply_confirmed=True

backward_compatibility.breaking_for: Any existing caller that relies on dry_run=False being the default
backward_compatibility.safe_for: All existing test clients (they pass dry_run=True explicitly)
backward_compatibility.migration_action: Audit all callers and ensure explicit dry_run=False where writes are intended

body.message: dry_run=False requires apply_confirmed=True and a valid confirm_token
body.hint: Run with dry_run=True first to get a preview and confirm_token

G02_server_side_confirm_token.title: Require server-side confirm token for any non-dry-run write
G02_server_side_confirm_token.rationale: The frontend confirmation gate (bfConfirmCheck) is UI-only JavaScript. A direct HTTP POST bypasses it entirely. The server must independently validate that the caller has explicitly opted into a write.

apply_confirmed.description: Must be True for dry_run=False to be accepted

confirm_token.description: Opaque token generated by a prior dry-run response. Encodes: lottery_type + expected_insert_count + timestamp + HMAC. Server validates token has not expired (TTL=300s) and matches request context.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for write (e.g. 'fetcher repair backfill 2026-06-08')

expected_insert_count.description: Number of draws the caller expects to insert, from prior dry-run. If provided and actual count differs by >0, server returns 409 Conflict.

server_validation_logic: if dry_run is True: skip all token validation (read-only path)
if dry_run is False and apply_confirmed is not True: return 422 write_not_confirmed
if dry_run is False and confirm_token is None: return 422 missing_confirm_token
if dry_run is False and token is expired (>TTL): return 422 token_expired
if dry_run is False and token HMAC invalid: return 422 invalid_confirm_token
if dry_run is False and expected_insert_count provided and actual differs: return 409 count_mismatch
if all checks pass: proceed with write

dry_run_response_additions.confirm_token: Generated and returned in dry_run=True response for use in apply call
dry_run_response_additions.expected_insert_count: Number of draws that would be inserted in apply call

body.message: The confirm_token is missing, invalid, or expired. Re-run dry_run=True to get a fresh token.
Non-dry-run write requires confirm_token from a prior dry-run response.
body.hint: POST with dry_run=True first, capture confirm_token from response, then POST with dry_run=False

body.message: Expected N draws to insert but found M in current scan. DB may have changed since dry-run.
body.hint: Re-run dry_run=True to get a fresh count and confirm_token

G03_ui_confirmation.title: UI confirmation: write-preview-first, apply-second flow
G03_ui_confirmation.rationale: The current checkbox-based confirmation can be left checked across sessions. The modal must show exactly what will be written and reset after each operation.
required_flow: 2. Server returns dry-run summary: total, would-insert count, draw list, confirm_token, expires_at
3. UI displays preview table and enables 'Apply Write' button (only if inserted_count > 0)
4. User clicks 'Apply Write' → modal dialog appears
5. Modal shows: 'You are about to write N draws to the database: [draw list]. This cannot be undone automatically.'
6. Modal has two buttons: 'Confirm Write' and 'Cancel'
7. On confirm: UI sends POST with dry_run=False, apply_confirmed=True, confirm_token from step 2
8. Modal and confirmation state reset after response (success or error)
9. Page load / auto-refresh MUST NEVER send POST with dry_run=False
forbidden_behaviors: Reusing a confirm_token across multiple apply attempts
Leaving the confirmation state persistent across tab reloads
Enabling 'Apply Write' without first completing a dry-run preview

auto_load_constraint.GET /api/ingest/log: ALLOWED — read-only, fires on page load

modal_copy_requirements.title: Confirm Database Write
modal_copy_requirements.body_template: You are about to write {n} draw(s) to the {lottery_type} database. This action will be logged but cannot be automatically undone.
modal_copy_requirements.draw_list_display: Show each draw number, date, and numbers to be inserted

G04_audit_log.title: Audit log requirements: every write attempt must be fully logged

required_additional_fields_for_write.dry_run: bool — was this call dry_run or not
required_additional_fields_for_write.pre_count: int — DB row count for lottery_type before write
required_additional_fields_for_write.post_count: int — DB row count for lottery_type after write (null for dry_run)
required_additional_fields_for_write.confirm_token_used: str — first 8 chars of confirm_token (not full for security)
required_additional_fields_for_write.db_sha256_before: str — SHA256 of DB file before write (null for dry_run)
required_additional_fields_for_write.db_sha256_after: str — SHA256 of DB file after write (null for dry_run or failure)

log_timing.on_validation_failure: Log rejection reason (missing token, expired, count mismatch)

G04_audit_log.extends_existing: IngestLogger.log() — add fields to data dict; no schema break

G05_backup_sha_integrity.title: Controlled-apply style DB SHA and optional backup before any write batch
G05_backup_sha_integrity.rationale: P254B incident showed no rollback point existed after an accidental write. Any future write path should record a verifiable pre-write state.
required_steps_before_insert: 2. Log pre_sha to ingest_log (G04 audit entry)
7. Log post_sha + delta (post_count - pre_count) to ingest_log

sha256_implementation.note: For large DBs, use chunked read: update in 65536-byte blocks

backup_policy.retention: Keep last 10 backups per lottery_type; auto-prune older ones

abort_on_sha_mismatch.scenario: Server computes pre_sha; but pre_sha does not match expected_db_sha in request
abort_on_sha_mismatch.note: UI can optionally send expected_db_sha from prior dry-run to enable this check

G06_idempotency.title: Server-side idempotency: per-request key and per-draw DB constraint

layer_1_per_request.format: UUID v4 or caller-generated opaque string
layer_1_per_request.server_behavior: Server logs idempotency_key at write start. If same key received again within TTL=60s, return 409 already_processed.
layer_1_per_request.storage: In-memory dict or ingest_log scan (simpler: log-based dedup)

layer_2_per_draw.behavior: Duplicate draw silently becomes skipped (not error)
layer_2_per_draw.note: This is already implemented; G06 only adds the request-level layer

body.message: A write with this idempotency_key was already received within the last 60 seconds.
body.hint: Use a new idempotency_key for a fresh write attempt.

G07_cors_hardening.title: Remove wildcard CORS origin; gate wildcard behind env-var

current_state.risk: Wildcard allows any cross-origin page to POST to write-capable endpoints

G07_cors_hardening.behavior: If INGEST_CORS_ALLOW_ALL=true, append '*' to origins (dev override only)
G07_cors_hardening.startup_warning: Log WARNING if INGEST_CORS_ALLOW_ALL=true at startup

G08_env_write_gate.title: INGEST_WRITE_ENABLED env-var gate for write-capable endpoints
G08_env_write_gate.rationale: Allows read-only monitoring (log, scan, dry-run) without exposing the write path. Maintenance windows can be opened by setting INGEST_WRITE_ENABLED=true.

body.message: Ingest write operations are currently disabled.
body.hint: Set INGEST_WRITE_ENABLED=true in the server environment to enable writes.

G08_env_write_gate.startup_warning: Log WARNING if INGEST_WRITE_ENABLED=true in production context

validation_order: 1. Check INGEST_WRITE_ENABLED (G08) — if false and dry_run=False, return 503
2. Check G01: if dry_run=False, require apply_confirmed=True
3. Check G02: if dry_run=False, require confirm_token (not None, not expired, HMAC valid)
4. Check G06: if idempotency_key present, check for recent duplicate
5. Compute pre_sha (G05) and log audit entry start (G04)
7. Log audit entry complete (G04) with post_sha

error_responses.422_invalid_confirm_token: token is malformed or HMAC invalid

failure_mode_design.scenario: Caller sends POST /api/ingest/backfill with no dry_run field
Caller sends dry_run=False without apply_confirmed or confirm_token
Confirm token expired (user waited >5 min between dry-run and apply)
DB changed between dry-run and apply (another agent inserted draws)
failure_mode_design.current_behavior: Silently inserts or skips — no warning to caller

failure_mode_design.scenario: Network retry sends same apply request twice
failure_mode_design.current_behavior: Second call silently skips duplicates (DB UNIQUE constraint)
failure_mode_design.proposed_behavior: 409 already_processed if idempotency_key matches within TTL

failure_mode_design.scenario: Frontend auto-refresh or page reload triggers write
failure_mode_design.current_behavior: Possible if JS state is dirty (confirmed checkbox left checked)
failure_mode_design.proposed_behavior: FORBIDDEN by G03 contract; server requires confirm_token from fresh dry-run

failure_mode_design.scenario: INGEST_WRITE_ENABLED=false and someone tries to write
Missing confirm_token (direct API call bypassing UI)
failure_mode_design.current_behavior: Writes to DB with no additional check

future_p255c_implementation_scope.title: Implement P255B ingest write guard specification
future_p255c_implementation_scope.authorization_required: Separate explicit user authorization before P255C can start

files_to_modify: src/ui/AutoFetchManager.js — modal confirmation flow + dry_run=True default
new_tests: tests/test_p255c_write_guard_integration.py — TestClient tests for all G01-G08 paths

pre_conditions: P255B design artifact reviewed and approved
P247G guard baseline remains 22239/2114 before implementation
All prior regression tests pass before starting

recommended_next_task: HOLD.  P255B design-only artifact is complete.  P255C implementation requires a separate explicit user authorization.  No action should be taken on the write guard design without that authorization.
final_decision: HOLD.  P255B design is complete.  G01-G08 specifications are documented.  No code was modified.  No DB write occurred.  P255C implementation requires: 'Authorize P255C Ingest Write Guard Implementation'.  System returns to WAITING_FOR_USER_AUTHORIZATION.
